consultation-chez: Consultation at : BEVET veterinary clinic in WANZE
choix-raisonne: Reasoned choice of a surgical technique in case of RLCA (rupture of the anterior cruciate ligaments)
type-talia: TTA all in one plating system
descr-talia: New implant for TTA: esay to place and esay to extract
descr-ttaz: New implant for TTA with a new type of spacing wedge cage create with artificial bone
descr-ivls: IVLS 345 is a special titanium spacer designed for cervical vertebral arthrodesis for dogs from 1,5 kilo to 25 kilos
descr-dap: New articulated prothesis for disk replacement
rgpd-p0b: This Privacy Policy describes how PIMASTER collects, uses and protects your personal data when you use our website pimaster.be.
rgpd-p1a: We may collect the following data:
rgpd-p1b: Identification data: last name, first name, email address, telephone number
rgpd-p1c: Browsing data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, duration of visit, etc.
rgpd-p2a: The data collected is used to:
rgpd-p2b: Provide and manage the services and products offered on the Site.
rgpd-p2c: Improve user experience and personalize content.
rgpd-p2d: Respond to your requests and provide you with assistance.
rgpd-p2e: Send promotional communications (if you have given your consent).
rgpd-p3a: We process your personal data on the following legal bases:
rgpd-p3c: The execution of a contract (article 6(1)(b) of the GDPR).
rgpd-p3d: Compliance with legal obligations (article 6(1)(c) of the GDPR).
rgpd-p3e: Our legitimate interest (article 6(1)(f) of the GDPR).
rgpd-p4a: Your personal data will only be shared with:
rgpd-p4b: Our service providers (hosting, analysis tools, etc.).
rgpd-p4c: The competent authorities, in the event of a legal obligation.
rgpd-p4d: We promise to never sell your personal data.
rgpd-p5a: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes mentioned above or in accordance with applicable legal requirements.
rgpd-p6a: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:
rgpd-p6d: Deletion of your data ('right to be forgotten').
rgpd-p6e: Limitation of the processing of your data.
rgpd-p6f: Opposition to processing, in particular for prospecting purposes.
rgpd-p6h: Withdrawal of your consent at any time.
rgpd-p6i: To exercise your rights, please contact us at: **********
rgpd-p8a: We implement technical and organizational measures to guarantee the security of your personal data and prevent its loss, misuse or unauthorized access.
rgpd-p9a: For any questions or requests regarding our Privacy Policy, you can contact us at:
resume-ortho-a: Presentation of films of dogs or cats presented at the clinic for lameness and locomotor disorders.
resume-ortho-b: Observation of the approach directs the practitioner towards an orthopedic or neurological conception of the conditions (or both)
resume-infl-a: The introduction reviews the physiological mechanisms of inflammation and pain. How does inflammation occur and how does it cause pain? How is this pain perceived?
resume-infl-b: The corpus of the presentation addresses the pharmacodynamics of the different anti-inflammatory and analgesic molecules: steroidal and non-steroidal anti-inflammatories, opioids and their derivatives, new molecules.
resume-infl-c: The presentation ends with a crucial question: Should we kill the inflammation to make the pain go away?
resume-paralysie-a: What are the basics of a neurological clinical examination?
resume-paralysie-b: Detailed description of the physiopathological mechanisms of locomotor disorders of neurological origin of the front and hind limbs.
resume-paralysie-c: Definition of the concepts of central and peripheral motor neurons.
resume-paralysie-d: Description of reflexes and their interpretation.
resume-pm-c: What types of surgeries does he perform?
resume-pm-d: How to present your clinical activity?
